examples: Other parents, upon learning that their child had been replaced by changelings, had their hair turn white overnight, were stunned into catatonia, heart attacks, or sudden death.
Other parents, upon learning that their child had been replaced by changelings, had their hair turn white overnight, were stunned into 36 catatonia, heart attacks, or sudden death.
